title: Parents booking air-conditioned hotels to keep babies safe in UK heatwave
summary_full: Hotels report increase in last-minute bookings, including from families attempting to escape hot homesEurope heatwave: latest updatesFamilies, including parents with newborn babies, are booking air-conditioned rooms in hotels to escape the UK heatwave, with companies reporting a surge in demand.Data from the accommodation reservation website Booking.com shows that since 1 June, the share of searches using the “air-conditioning” filter has tripled across Great Britain coinciding with the latest heatwave in northern Europe.
